meta.description: Matiq Labs builds AI systems that automate manual operational workflows for businesses.
meta.homeTitle: Matiq Labs — AI Systems for Business Operations
meta.homeDescription: Matiq Labs builds AI systems that remove repetitive manual work from business operations. Start with a discovery session.

hero.label: AI FOR BUSINESS OPERATIONS
hero.title: Do more with the team You already have.
hero.description: We help businesses automate work, cut costs, and move faster with AI.

problem.label: The reality
problem.title: Operations slow down one manual step at a time.
problem.description: The problem is usually not the team. It is the workflow. Critical processes still depend on someone remembering, checking, copying, chasing, correcting, and following up. That works at small volume. It breaks when the business grows.
kpis: Lost to chasing, checking, and cleanup per operator.
Systems or people involved in one fragile workflow.
Operational tasks that repeat but still need people.
problem.signalTitle: Good teams trapped in low-value work.
problem.signalBody: The judgment your team was hired for gets spent on sorting files, cleaning data, and chasing the next missing detail.
metrics: When one person is unavailable, the workflow slows down.
Every vendor, file, and exception creates more manual effort.
More volume means more coordination, not more clarity.

build.label: What we build
build.title: AI systems built around how your business actually works.
cards: We find where time, delay, and operational risk are concentrated before deciding what should be automated.
We build around your actual workflow — the inputs, exceptions, approvals, and edge cases your team handles every day.
We deploy into your workflow, train your team, and hand over a system they can run without us in the room.

services.label: Services
services.title: We find the manual workflow worth fixing first.
services.description: Most businesses already know where work feels painful. Reconciliation. Approvals. Reporting. Vendor coordination. Document processing. Follow-ups. We help turn that pain into a system that runs with less manual effort.
items: Document intake and processing
Invoice matching and reconciliation
Approval routing and exception handling
Reporting, handoffs, and follow-through

about.label: About
about.title: We build systems that do the work.
about.description: Matiq Labs is an AI automation company for operations-heavy businesses. We help teams move away from manual coordination and toward systems that understand the workflow, handle variation, and keep work moving.
spotlight: We understand the workflow before we design the system.
Real workflows are messy. The system has to work anyway.
A demo is not enough. The system must survive real data, real users, and real edge cases.
principles: We go deep into the way a business operates before we build around it.
We care whether the workflow actually changes, not just whether software gets shipped.
Your team should be able to run the system independently. That is part of the build.

featured.label: Featured product
featured.title: Freight reconciliation without the spreadsheet marathon.
featured.description: CargoMatiq reads vendor statements in messy real-world formats, extracts invoice data, reconciles against internal records, and produces a clean report your AP team can act on immediately.

process.label: How we work
process.title: We start with the workflow.
process.introTitle: No proposal before understanding the work.
process.introBody: Before we scope anything, we learn how the work moves today — the tools involved, the exceptions that slow it down, and the handoffs that quietly depend on people.
process.engagementShapeBody: One workflow, one accountable build, one live outcome.
process.deliveryPrincipleBody: Simple for operators. Clear for leadership.
steps: We identify where repetitive work, inconsistency, and operational risk are concentrated.
We model the workflow around real inputs, real exceptions, and the tools your team already uses.
We test the system against the formats, edge cases, and constraints your operations already deal with.
Deployment, documentation, and team training are part of the build — not an afterthought.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Tell us where the workflow breaks.
contact.description: What is still manual? Where does the team lose time every week? Which process slows down when volume increases? That is enough to start.
contact.formDescription: Describe the workflow, what is manual today, and where the team loses time. We will come back with a clear view on what automation could look like.

hero.label: Product · Freight Operations
hero.name: CargoMatiq
hero.subtitle: Freight reconciliation automation
hero.title: Freight reconciliation, without the spreadsheet work.
hero.description: CargoMatiq reads vendor statements, extracts invoice data, matches it against internal records, and turns messy reconciliation into a clean exception-ready report.

fit.label: Best fit
fit.title: For freight teams still reconciling manually.
items: You manage recurring vendor statements every month
Your AP team still closes reconciliation across inboxes, spreadsheets, and exports
You need faster visibility into what is matched, missing, disputed, or ready to pay
You want automation without forcing vendors to change how they send statements

why.label: Why it matters
why.title: The hard part is not matching. It is the mess before matching.
why.description: Vendor statements arrive as Excel files, PDFs, email tables, and old reply chains. Headers vary. Amount formats differ. Context gets buried. By the time reconciliation starts, the team has already spent hours just preparing the data.
capabilities: Reads email, PDF, Excel, HTML tables, and Outlook reply chains
Handles vendor-specific formats without template setup
Runs exact and tolerance-aware reconciliation against internal exports
Flags mismatches, disputes, missing entries, and payment-ready lines

steps.label: How it works
steps.title: From statement to report.
items: 01 Ingest
CargoMatiq accepts the source as it arrives.
Vendor emails, Excel attachments, PDF statements, HTML body tables, and Outlook reply chains can be processed without asking your team to reformat them first.
02 Extract
Every usable line becomes structured invoice data.
Invoice number, date, amount, and vendor context are extracted even when formats are inconsistent, merged, or buried inside a long email chain.
03 Reconcile
Every line is matched against internal records.
Exact matches are cleared first. Tolerance-aware logic handles small rounding differences. What remains is a short list of exceptions that actually need attention.
04 Deliver
Your AP team gets output they can act on.
Reconciliation report, dispute list, payment packet, and aging summary are generated in one place without copying data across tools.

proof.label: By the numbers
proof.title: A cleaner way to close a vendor batch.

form.title: Request access to CargoMatiq
form.description: Tell us how reconciliation works today — vendor volume, file formats, systems involved, and where month-end usually slows down. We will review it and get back with the right next step.
